title: openbindings.operation-graph validation fixture file
description: Well-formedness fixtures keyed to the stable OG-V-## validation-rule identifiers in the openbindings.operation-graph spec. Each rule block carries `schemaEnforced`, declaring whether the op-graph JSON Schema alone is sufficient to catch violations of that rule; a runner uses it to decide whether to assert schema rejection on the negative cases.

rule.description: The stable validation-rule identifier (OG-V-##) from the format spec's Validation rules section.

schemaEnforced.description: True if the op-graph JSON Schema alone rejects every violation of this rule; false if catching it requires a structural validator beyond JSON Schema (reachability, cycle analysis, cross-references).

graph.description: An operation graph definition. valid:true graphs MUST validate against the op-graph JSON Schema; valid:false graphs for schemaEnforced rules MUST be rejected by it.

valid.description: Whether the graph satisfies the named validation rule.

operations.description: For OG-V-11 tests only: the operation keys the containing OBI declares. The runner resolves the `operation` field of every operation and each node against this set.
